---
name: Primitive proposal
about: Propose a new structural building block to add to PRIMITIVES.md
title: "Primitive: <name>"
labels: primitive-proposal
---

**Proposed primitive name**

<!-- One to three words. -->

**Definition**

<!-- One sentence. What structural role does this primitive play in any task? -->

**Concrete signature**

<!-- Required. Where would this primitive appear in a real benchmark spec, harness config, environment interface, or agent trace? Name a specific benchmark or evaluation setup where it is observable. -->

**Worked examples**

<!-- At least two tasks or benchmarks where this primitive varies, and what changes when it does. -->

**What this makes visible**

<!-- What does naming this primitive reveal that a leaderboard score or pass-rate hides? -->

**Extractive constraint check**

<!-- Have you verified this primitive is not already covered by an existing primitive in PRIMITIVES.md, even under a different name? Which existing primitives did you check? -->
